title: Rich Creamy Spanish Chickpea Stew
description: A velvety, aromatic chickpea stew studded with bell pepper, zucchini, and spinach, finished with coconut cream and saffron for a luxurious, Jain-friendly Spanish twist.

ingredients.name: saffron threads
ingredients.notes: steep in 1 tbsp warm water for 10 min

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add cumin and smoked paprika, sautéing for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add diced bell pepper, zucchini, and spinach; cook for 4‑5 minutes until vegetables soften.
Pour in vegetable broth and bring to a simmer.
Add cooked chickpeas and saffron-infused water, stirring to combine.
Simmer gently for 10 minutes to meld flavors.
Reduce heat, stir in coconut cream and lemon juice, warming through for 2 minutes.
Garnish with chopped cilantro before serving.
